\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4378 introduces Ytheta Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi_p(x,y;\theta) = \frac{1}{\mathcal{N}_p(\theta)} K_p(x,y;\theta) \]
